channel.title: Austin Hackers Anonymous — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Austin Hackers Anonymous (aha).

item.title: CVE-2026-7415 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Open MQTT orchestration without read/write ACLs in Yarbo robot firmware
item.description: The MQTT broker embedded in Yarbo firmware v2.3.9 is configured to allow anonymous connections with no topic-level read or write ACLs. Any host on the same network can subscribe to sensitive telemetry topics or publish control messages directly to th…

item.title: CVE-2026-7414 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Hardcoded credentials in Yarbo robot firmware
item.description: Yarbo firmware v2.3.9 contains hardcoded administrative credentials embedded in the firmware image. These credentials are identical across all devices running this firmware and cannot be changed or removed by end users, enabling trivial unauthorized…

item.title: CVE-2026-7413 · 7.2 HIGH — Persistent undocumented backdoor access in Yarbo robot
item.description: A hidden, persistent backdoor was found in Yarbo firmware v2.3.9 that provides remote, unauthenticated (or weakly authenticated) access to privileged functionality. The backdoor is undocumented, cannot be disabled via user-facing settings, and surviv…

item.title: CVE-2026-4946 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — NSA Ghidra Auto-Analysis Annotation Command Execution
item.description: Ghidra versions prior to 12.0.3 improperly process annotation directives embedded in automatically extracted binary data, resulting in arbitrary command execution when an analyst interacts with the UI. Specifically, the @execute annotation (which is…

item.title: CVE-2026-1442 · 7.8 HIGH — Unitree UPK files Hard-Coded Key
item.description: Since the encryption algorithm used to protect firmware updates is itself encrypted using key material available to an attacker (or anyone paying attention), the firmware updates may be altered by an unauthorized user, and then trusted by a Unitree p…

item.title: CVE-2025-35028 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — HexStrike AI MCP Server Command Injection
item.description: By providing a command-line argument starting with a semi-colon ; to an API endpoint created by the EnhancedCommandExecutor class of the HexStrike AI MCP server, the resultant composed command is executed directly in the context of the MCP server’s n…

item.title: CVE-2025-35021 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Abilis CPX Fallback Shell Connection Relay
item.description: By failing to authenticate three times to an unconfigured Abilis CPX device via SSH, an attacker can login to a restricted shell on the fourth attempt, and from there, relay connections.

item.title: CVE-2025-35027 · 7.3 HIGH — Unitree Multiple Robotic Products Command Injection
item.description: Multiple robotic products by Unitree sharing a common firmware, including the Go2, G1, H1, and B2 devices, contain a command injection vulnerability. By setting a malicious string when configuring the on-board WiFi via a BLE module of an affected rob…

item.title: CVE-2025-8452 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Unauthenticated leak of sensitive information affecting multiple models from Brother Industries, Ltd., Toshiba Tec, and Konica Minolta, Inc.
item.description: By using the "uscan" protocol provided by the eSCL specification, an attacker can discover the serial number of multi-function printers that implement the Brother-provided firmware. This serial number can, in turn, can be leveraged by the flaw descri…

item.title: CVE-2025-35010 · 7.1 HIGH — Microhard Bullet-LTE and IPn4Gii AT+MNPINGTM Argument Injection
item.description: Products that incorporate the Microhard BulletLTE-NA2 and IPn4Gii-NA2 are vulnerable to a post-authentication command injection issue in the AT+MNPINGTM command that can lead to privilege escalation. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutraliz…

item.title: CVE-2025-35009 · 7.1 HIGH — Microhard Bullet-LTE and IPn4Gii AT+MNNETSP Argument Injection
item.description: Products that incorporate the Microhard BulletLTE-NA2 and IPn4Gii-NA2 are vulnerable to a post-authentication command injection issue in the AT+MNNETSP command that can lead to privilege escalation. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutraliza…

item.title: CVE-2025-35008 · 7.1 HIGH — Microhard Bullet-LTE and IPn4Gii AT+MMNAME Argument Injection
item.description: Products that incorporate the Microhard BulletLTE-NA2 and IPn4Gii-NA2 are vulnerable to a post-authentication command injection issue in the AT+MMNAME command that can lead to privilege escalation. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralizat…

item.title: CVE-2025-35007 · 7.1 HIGH — Microhard Bullet-LTE and IPn4Gii AT+MFRULE Argument Injection
item.description: Products that incorporate the Microhard BulletLTE-NA2 and IPn4Gii-NA2 are vulnerable to a post-authentication command injection issue in the AT+MFRULE command that can lead to privilege escalation. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralizat…

item.title: CVE-2025-35006 · 7.1 HIGH — Microhard Bullet-LTE and IPn4Gii AT+MFPORTFWD Argument Injection
item.description: Products that incorporate the Microhard BulletLTE-NA2 and IPn4Gii-NA2 are vulnerable to a post-authentication command injection issue in the AT+MFPORTFWD command that can lead to privilege escalation. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutrali…

item.title: CVE-2025-35005 · 7.1 HIGH — Microhard Bullet-LTE and IPn4Gii AT+MFMAC Argument Injection
item.description: Products that incorporate the Microhard BulletLTE-NA2 and IPn4Gii-NA2 are vulnerable to a post-authentication command injection issue in the AT+MFMAC command that can lead to privilege escalation. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralizati…

item.title: CVE-2025-35004 · 7.1 HIGH — Microhard Bullet-LTE and IPn4Gii AT+MFIP Argument Injection
item.description: Products that incorporate the Microhard BulletLTE-NA2 and IPn4Gii-NA2 are vulnerable to a post-authentication command injection issue in the AT+MFIP command that can lead to privilege escalation. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralizatio…

item.title: CVE-2025-32459 · 7.7 HIGH — ON Semiconductor Quantenna router_command.sh (in the sync_time argument) Argument Injection
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chipset ships with a local control script, router_command.sh (in the sync_time argument), that is vulnerable to command injection. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argum…

item.title: CVE-2025-32458 · 7.7 HIGH — ON Semiconductor Quantenna router_command.sh (in the get_syslog_from_qtn argument) Argument Injection
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chipset ships with a local control script, router_command.sh (in the get_syslog_from_qtn argument), that is vulnerable to command injection. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Comma…

item.title: CVE-2025-32457 · 7.7 HIGH — ON Semiconductor Quantenna router_command.sh (in the get_file_from_qtn argument) Argument Injection
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chipset ships with a local control script, router_command.sh (in the get_file_from_qtn argument), that is vulnerable to command injection. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command…

item.title: CVE-2025-32456 · 7.7 HIGH — ON Semiconductor Quantenna router_command.sh (in the put_file_to_qtn argument) Argument Injection
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chipset ships with a local control script, router_command.sh (in the put_file_to_qtn argument), that is vulnerable to command injection. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command (…

item.title: CVE-2025-32455 · 7.7 HIGH — ON Semiconductor Quantenna router_command.sh (in the run_cmd argument) Argument Injection
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chipset ships with a local control script, router_command.sh (in the run_cmd argument), that is vulnerable to command injection. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argumen…

item.title: CVE-2025-3461 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — ON Semiconductor Quantenna Telnet Missing Authentication
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chips ship with an unauthenticated telnet interface by default. This is an instance of CWE-306, "Missing Authentication for Critical Function," and is estimated as a CVSS 9.1 (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N). This is…

item.title: CVE-2025-3460 · 7.7 HIGH — ON Semiconductor Quantenna set_tx_pow Argument Injection
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chipset ships with a local control script, set_tx_pow, that is vulnerable to command injection. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')," and is estimated…

item.title: CVE-2025-3459 · 7.7 HIGH — ON Semiconductor Quantenna transmit_file Argument Injection
item.description: The Quantenna Wi-Fi chipset ships with a local control script, transmit_file, that is vulnerable to command injection. This is an instance of CWE-88, "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')," and is estimat…

item.title: CVE-2025-2894 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Unitree Go1 Robot Dog Backdoor Control Channel
item.description: The Go1 also known as "The World's First Intelligence Bionic Quadruped Robot Companion of Consumer Level," contains an undocumented backdoor that can enable the manufacturer, and anyone in possession of the correct API key, complete remote control ov…

item.title: CVE-2024-4224 · 5.4 MEDIUM — TP-Link TL-SG1016DE XSS
item.description: An authenticated stored cross-site scripting (XSS) exists in the TP-Link TL-SG1016DE affecting version TL-SG1016DE(UN) V7.6_1.0.0 Build 20230616, which could allow an adversary to run JavaScript in an administrator's browser. This issue was fixed in…

item.title: CVE-2024-2056 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Artica Proxy Loopback Services Remotely Accessible Unauthenticated
item.description: Services that are running and bound to the loopback interface on the Artica Proxy are accessible through the proxy service. In particular, the "tailon" service is running, running as the root user, is bound to the loopback interface, and is listening…

item.title: CVE-2024-2055 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Artica Proxy Unauthenticated File Manager Vulnerability
item.description: The "Rich Filemanager" feature of Artica Proxy provides a web-based interface for file management capabilities. When the feature is enabled, it does not require authentication by default, and runs as the root user.

item.title: CVE-2024-2054 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Artica Proxy Unauthenticated PHP Deserialization Vulnerability
item.description: The Artica-Proxy administrative web application will deserialize arbitrary PHP objects supplied by unauthenticated users and subsequently enable code execution as the "www-data" user.

item.title: CVE-2024-2053 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Artica Proxy Unauthenticated LFI Protection Bypass Vulnerability
item.description: The Artica Proxy administrative web application will deserialize arbitrary PHP objects supplied by unauthenticated users and subsequently enable code execution as the "www-data" user. This issue was demonstrated on version 4.50 of the The Artica-Prox…

item.title: CVE-2023-5841 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OpenEXR Heap Overflow in Scanline Deep Data Parsing
item.description: Due to a failure in validating the number of scanline samples of a OpenEXR file containing deep scanline data, Academy Software Foundation OpenEX image parsing library version 3.2.1 and prior is susceptible to a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerabili…

item.title: CVE-2023-4504 · 7 HIGH — OpenPrinting CUPS/libppd Postscript Parsing Heap Overflow
item.description: Due to failure in validating the length provided by an attacker-crafted PPD PostScript document, CUPS and libppd are susceptible to a heap-based buffer overflow and possibly code execution. This issue has been fixed in CUPS version 2.4.7, released in…

item.title: CVE-2023-2906 — Wireshark CP2179 divide by zero
item.description: Due to a failure in validating the length provided by an attacker-crafted CP2179 packet, Wireshark versions 2.0.0 through 4.0.7 is susceptible to a divide by zero allowing for a denial of service attack.

item.title: CVE-2023-2905 — Cesanta Mongoose MQTT Message Parsing Heap Overflow
item.description: Due to a failure in validating the length of a provided MQTT_CMD_PUBLISH parsed message with a variable length header, Cesanta Mongoose, an embeddable web server, version 7.10 is susceptible to a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the defaul…

item.title: CVE-2023-0667 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Wireshark MSMMS parsing buffer overflow
item.description: Due to failure in validating the length provided by an attacker-crafted MSMMS packet, Wireshark version 4.0.5 and prior, in an unusual configuration, is susceptible to a heap-based buffer overflow, and possibly code execution in the context of the pr…

item.title: CVE-2023-0668 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Wireshark IEEE-C37.118 parsing buffer overflow
item.description: Due to failure in validating the length provided by an attacker-crafted IEEE-C37.118 packet, Wireshark version 4.0.5 and prior, by default, is susceptible to a heap-based buffer overflow, and possibly code execution in the context of the process runn…

item.title: CVE-2023-0666 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Wireshark RTPS Parsing Buffer Overflow
item.description: Due to failure in validating the length provided by an attacker-crafted RTPS packet, Wireshark version 4.0.5 and prior, by default, is susceptible to a heap-based buffer overflow, and possibly code execution in the context of the process running Wire…
